External dependencies are polyfills and utilities, no untrusted data processing.  \n- **Anomalies:** No credentials, backdoors, obfuscation, or malicious network activity. Dynamic setting of '__webpack_require__.p' based on script URL is common.  \n- **Analysis:** Typical Webpack/Vue bundle, standard event handling, property management. No malicious behavior detected.  \n- **Conclusion:** Safe, standard component bundle, no security issues.  \n- **Confidence:** 0.95  \n- **Malware:** 0\n\n---\n\n**Report 2**  \n- **Purpose:** Vue.js components for form fields, rating, input handling.  \n- **Sources:** Props, attributes, DOM events, no external untrusted sources.  \n- **Sinks:** Emits 'input' events, DOM manipulations—nothing malicious.  \n- **Flows:** User interactions → 'mutatedValue' → 'input' events. No external data exfiltration or malicious sinks.  \n- **Anomalies:** No credentials, obfuscation, or suspicious code. No external or untrusted data sources involved.  \n- **Anomalies:** No secrets, backdoors, obfuscation, or network activity.  \n- **Analysis:** Typical Vue component with star rating UI, safe data handling, no malicious intent.  \n- **Conclusion:** Safe, standard UI component.  \n- **Confidence:** 1  \n- **Malware:** 0\n\n---\n\n**Report 4**  \n- **Purpose:** Vue components for dynamic form inputs, including rating and checkbox fields.  \n- **Sources:** Props, DOM events, attributes—standard data sources.  \n- **Sinks:** Emits 'input' events, DOM updates—no network or system calls.  \n- **Flows:** User input updates internal state, propagates via events; no external or untrusted data flows.  \n- **Anomalies:** No credentials, obfuscation, or suspicious code. There are no signs of malware, obfuscation, or supply chain compromise.
